CustomField.label: Severity
CustomField.description: Business impact level applied only when this check results in FAIL. Error shows red, Warning shows amber, Info shows blue. Has no effect on PASS, SKIPPED, UNABLE_TO_EVALUATE, or ERROR states.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Sets the visual severity when this check fails. Error = red, Warning = amber, Info = blue. Does not affect non-FAIL outcomes.
